Let me draft the complete file:

```typescript
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";

interface NetNode {
  stage: number;
  idx: number;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  z: number;
  act: number;
  grad: number;
  twinkle: number;
  patchVal: number;
}

interface NetEdge {
  a: NetNode;
  b: NetNode;
  w: number;
  tw: number;
  kind: "embed" | "cross" | "attn" | "ffn" | "pred";
}

// VLM (Vision-Language Model) architecture stages:
//   stage 0: image patches (3×3 grid)     — vision input
//   stage 1: vision encoder (6, ring)      — ViT self-attention + FFN
//   stage 2: text tokens (6, ring)         — language input
//   stage 3: cross-attention (6, ring)     — language queries ← vision keys
//   stage 4: language decoder (6, ring)    — LM self-attention + FFN
//   stage 5: next-token prediction (1)     — output
const STAGE_SIZES = [9, 6, 6, 6, 6, 1];
const NUM_STAGES = STAGE_SIZES.length;
const PATCH_GRID = 3;
const N_TOK = 6;

// Vision self-attention patterns
const V_PATTERNS: Array<(i: number, j: number) => number> = [
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-Math.abs(i - j) / 1.8),
  (i, j) => (i === j ? 0.9 : 0.22 + 0.1 * ((i + j) % 3)),
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-((i - j - 1) ** 2) / 2.2),
];

// Cross-attention patterns (language query i, vision key j)
const C_PATTERNS: Array<(i: number, j: number) => number> = [
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-Math.abs(i - j) / 2.0),
  (i, j) => 0.3 + 0.5 * Math.abs(Math.sin((i + 1) * (j + 1) * 0.5)),
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-((i * 2 - j) ** 2) / 3.5),
  (i, j) => (j >= i ? Math.exp(-(j - i) / 2.0) : 0.15),
];

const C = {
  edge: "hsl(205, 22%, 52%)",
  cross: "hsl(190, 30%, 56%)",
  pulse: "hsl(200, 35%, 70%)",
  node: "hsl(205, 24%, 58%)",
  pos: "hsl(205, 20%, 50%)",
  grad: "hsl(30, 50%, 60%)",     // warm amber for backward gradients
  gradPulse: "hsl(32, 55%, 65%)",
  patch: "hsl(205, 20%, 54%)",
};

const DASH = [3, 4];
const TAU = Math.PI * 2;

// Fixed camera — angled view showing 3D depth, no rotation
const FIXED_ROT_Y = 0.48;
const CAM_TILT = -0.38;
const FOCAL = 950;
const CAM_Z = 820;

// Training phases
const FWD_DUR = 3.0;
const BWD_DUR = 2.6;
const UPD_DUR = 0.9;
const CYCLE_DUR = FWD_DUR + BWD_DUR + UPD_DUR;

export default function ParticleField() {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d", { alpha: true });
    if (!ctx) return;

    let animationId = 0;
    let width = 0;
    let height = 0;
    let dpr = 1;
    let resizeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;

    let nodes: NetNode[][] = [];
    let edges: NetEdge[] = [];
    let runStart = performance.now();
    let nextReset = 28 + Math.random() * 12;
    let cycle = 0;
    let vPatIdx = Math.floor(Math.random() * V_PATTERNS.length);
    let cPatIdx = Math.floor(Math.random() * C_PATTERNS.length);

    const randn = () =>
      (Math.random() + Math.random() + Math.random() - 1.5) * 0.5;

    let stageSpacingX = 130;
    let ringRadius = 70;
    let patchSpacing = 42;
    let layoutCy = 0;

    // 3D point → screen. Fixed rotation, no camera movement.
    const project = (wx: number, wy: number, wz: number) => {
      const cosY = Math.cos(FIXED_ROT_Y);
      const sinY = Math.sin(FIXED_ROT_Y);
      const rx = wx * cosY - wz * sinY;
      const rz = wx * sinY + wz * cosY;
      const cosT = Math.cos(CAM_TILT);
      const sinT = Math.sin(CAM_TILT);
      const ty = wy * cosT - rz * sinT;
      const tz = wy * sinT + rz * cosT;
      const denom = CAM_Z + tz;
      const safeDenom = denom > 1 ? denom : 1;
      const scale = FOCAL / safeDenom;
      return {
        sx: width / 2 + rx * scale,
        sy: layoutCy + ty * scale,
        depth: tz,
        scale,
      };
    };

    const buildNetwork = () => {
      nodes = [];
      edges = [];

      const availW = width - 280;
      stageSpacingX = Math.max(105, Math.min(140, availW / (NUM_STAGES - 1)));
      const h = height;
      ringRadius = Math.min(65, h * 0.15);
      patchSpacing = Math.min(40, h * 0.085);
      layoutCy = height * 0.5;

      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const n = STAGE_SIZES[s];
        const stageNodes: NetNode[] = [];
        const wx = (s - (NUM_STAGES - 1) / 2) * stageSpacingX;

        if (s === 0) {
          // Image patches: 3×3 grid in Y-Z plane
          for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            const row = Math.floor(i / PATCH_GRID);
            const col = i % PATCH_GRID;
            stageNodes.push({
              stage: s,
              idx: i,
              x: wx,
              y: (row - 1) * patchSpacing,
              z: (col - 1) * patchSpacing,
              act: 0,
              grad: 0,
              twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              patchVal: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.4,
            });
          }
        } else if (s === NUM_STAGES - 1) {
          // Single prediction node
          stageNodes.push({
            stage: s,
            idx: 0,
            x: wx,
            y: 0,
            z: 0,
            act: 0,
            grad: 0,
            twinkle: 0,
            patchVal: 0,
          });
        } else {
          // Ring layout
          for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            const ang = (i / n) * TAU;
            stageNodes.push({
              stage: s,
              idx: i,
              x: wx,
              y: Math.cos(ang) * ringRadius,
              z: Math.sin(ang) * ringRadius,
              act: 0,
              grad: 0,
              twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              patchVal: 0,
            });
          }
        }
        nodes.push(stageNodes);
      }

      const addEdge = (a: NetNode, b: NetNode, w: number, kind: NetEdge["kind"]) => {
        edges.push({ a, b, w, tw: w, kind });
      };

      // Stage 0→1: patch embedding (each patch → multiple encoder nodes)
      for (const a of nodes[0]) for (const b of nodes[1]) {
        addEdge(a, b, 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.3, "embed");
      }

      // Stage 1→3: cross-attention (vision keys → language queries)
      const cpat = C_PATTERNS[cPatIdx];
      for (const a of nodes[1]) for (const b of nodes[3]) {
        addEdge(a, b, cpat(b.idx, a.idx), "cross");
      }

      // Stage 2→3: text attention (text tokens → cross-attention)
      const vpat = V_PATTERNS[vPatIdx];
      for (const a of nodes[2]) for (const b of nodes[3]) {
        addEdge(a, b, vpat(a.idx, b.idx), "attn");
      }

      // Stage 3→4: FFN
      for (const a of nodes[3]) for (const b of nodes[4]) {
        addEdge(a, b, randn() * 0.4 + 0.3, "ffn");
      }

      // Stage 4→5: prediction
      for (const a of nodes[4]) {
        addEdge(a, nodes[5][0], 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.3, "pred");
      }
    };

    const generatePatchPattern = () => {
      const cx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.5;
      const cy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.5;
      const sigma = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;
      for (let i = 0; i < STAGE_SIZES[0]; i++) {
        const row = Math.floor(i / PATCH_GRID);
        const col = i % PATCH_GRID;
        const dx = (col - 1) / 1.5 - cx;
        const dy = (row - 1) / 1.5 - cy;
        const val = Math.exp(-(dx * dx + dy * dy) / (2 * sigma * sigma));
        nodes[0][i].patchVal = 0.15 + val * 0.75;
      }
    };

    const resetRun = () => {
      vPatIdx = (vPatIdx + 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * (V_PATTERNS.length - 1))) % V_PATTERNS.length;
      cPatIdx = (cPatIdx + 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * (C_PATTERNS.length - 1))) % C_PATTERNS.length;
      const cpat = C_PATTERNS[cPatIdx];
      const vpat = V_PATTERNS[vPatIdx];
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind === "cross") e.tw = cpat(e.b.idx, e.a.idx);
        else if (e.kind === "attn") e.tw = vpat(e.a.idx, e.b.idx);
        else e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05;
      }
      generatePatchPattern();
      runStart = performance.now();
      nextReset = 28 + Math.random() * 12;
      cycle = 0;
    };

    const resize = () => {
      dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
      width = window.innerWidth;
      height = Math.min(380, Math.max(260, Math.floor(window.innerHeight * 0.38)));
      canvas.width = Math.floor(width * dpr);
      canvas.height = Math.floor(height * dpr);
      canvas.style.width = `${width}px`;
      canvas.style.height = `${height}px`;
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#000000";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
      buildNetwork();
      generatePatchPattern();
    };

    const debouncedResize = () => {
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(resize, 180);
    };

    const fillCircle = (sx: number, sy: number, r: number, color: string, alpha: number) => {
      if (r < 0.2) return;
      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, r, 0, TAU);
      ctx.fill();
    };

    const draw = (now: number) => {
      const rt = (now - runStart) * 0.001;
      if (rt > nextReset) resetRun();

      const cycleTime = rt % CYCLE_DUR;
      let phase: "fwd" | "bwd" | "upd" = "fwd";
      let phaseT = 0;
      if (cycleTime < FWD_DUR) {
        phase = "fwd";
        phaseT = cycleTime / FWD_DUR;
      } else if (cycleTime < FWD_DUR + BWD_DUR) {
        phase = "bwd";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - FWD_DUR) / BWD_DUR;
      } else {
        phase = "upd";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - FWD_DUR - BWD_DUR) / UPD_DUR;
      }

      const curCycle = Math.floor(rt / CYCLE_DUR);
      if (curCycle !== cycle) {
        cycle = curCycle;
        for (const e of edges) {
          if (e.kind !== "cross" && e.kind !== "attn") e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.03;
        }
      }

      const updateRate = phase === "upd" ? 0.08 : 0.012;
      for (const e of edges) e.w += (e.tw - e.w) * updateRate;

      // Sweep position for forward/backward
      let sweepPos = 0;
      let sweepDir: "fwd" | "bwd" | "none" = "none";
      if (phase === "fwd") {
        sweepPos = phaseT * (NUM_STAGES - 1);
        sweepDir = "fwd";
      } else if (phase === "bwd") {
        sweepPos = (1 - phaseT) * (NUM_STAGES - 1);
        sweepDir = "bwd";
      } else {
        sweepPos = -1; // no sweep during update
        sweepDir = "none";
      }

      // Update node activations
      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const dist = Math.abs(sweepPos - s);
        const bump = Math.exp(-(dist * dist) / 0.5);
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          if (phase === "upd") {
            n.act *= 0.82;
            n.grad *= 0.82;
          } else if (phase === "fwd") {
            n.act = Math.max(n.act * 0.84, bump);
            n.grad *= 0.88;
          } else {
            // backward
            n.grad = Math.max(n.grad * 0.84, bump);
            n.act *= 0.88;
          }
        }
      }

      // Fade previous frame
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42)";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      // Project all nodes
      const projNodes: Array<{ n: NetNode; sx: number; sy: number; depth: number; scale: number }> = [];
      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          const p = project(n.x, n.y, n.z);
          projNodes.push({ n, sx: p.sx, sy: p.sy, depth: p.depth, scale: p.scale });
        }
      }

      const isSweeping = sweepDir !== "none";

      type DrawItem = { depth: number; fn: () => void };
      const drawItems: DrawItem[] = [];

      for (const e of edges) {
        const a = e.a;
        const b = e.b;
        const lo = a.stage;
        const hi = b.stage;
        const mag = Math.abs(e.w);
        
        // Determine if this edge is being swept
        const sweeping = isSweeping && sweepPos >= lo - 0.1 && sweepPos <= hi + 0.1;

        let alpha = 0.02 + mag * 0.06;
        if (sweeping) {
          const span = hi - lo;
          const edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
          const prox = Math.sin(
            Math.min(1, Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(edgeProgress - 0.5) * 2)) * Math.PI * 0.5,
          );
          alpha += prox * 0.14;
        }

        // Weight update flash
        if (phase === "upd") {
          const flash = Math.sin(phaseT * Math.PI) * (0.3 + mag * 0.3);
          alpha += flash * 0.1;
        }

        const pa = project(a.x, a.y, a.z);
        const pb = project(b.x, b.y, b.z);
        const avgDepth = (pa.depth + pb.depth) * 0.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, avgDepth / 700)) * 0.55;
        const finalAlpha = Math.min(1, alpha * depthFactor);
        const avgScale = (pa.scale + pb.scale) * 0.5;
        
        const edgeColor = e.kind === "cross" ? C.cross : C.edge;
        const lw = (0.35 + mag * 0.6) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, avgScale));
        
        // For cross edges, slightly thicker
        const lwBoost = e.kind === "cross" ? 1.15 : 1.0;

        drawItems.push({
          depth: avgDepth,
          fn: () => {
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.globalAlpha = finalAlpha;
            ctx.strokeStyle = edgeColor;
            ctx.lineWidth = lw * lwBoost;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pa.sx, pa.sy);
            ctx.lineTo(pb.sx, pb.sy);
            ctx.stroke();

            // Pulse particle along edge during sweep
            if (sweeping && mag > 0.2) {
              const span = hi - lo;
              let edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
              // For backward sweep, reverse the direction
              if (sweepDir === "bwd") edgeProgress = 1 - edgeProgress;
              const px = pa.sx + (pb.sx - pa.sx) * edgeProgress;
              const py = pa.sy + (pb.sy - pa.sy) * edgeProgress;
              const pulseColor = sweepDir === "bwd" ? C.gradPulse : C.pulse;
              fillCircle(px, py, 1.2 * avgScale, pulseColor, 0.4);
            }
          },
        });
      }

      drawItems.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const it of drawItems) it.fn();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);

      // Nodes — back-to-front
      projNodes.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const { n, sx, sy, scale } of projNodes) {
        const isPrediction = n.stage === NUM_STAGES - 1;
        const isPatch = n.stage === 0;
        const baseR = (isPrediction ? 4.0 : isPatch ? 2.5 : 2.4) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, scale));
        
        const inputBoost = isPatch ? n.patchVal * (0.15 + 0.1 * Math.sin(rt * 0.8 + n.twinkle)) : 0;
        const glow = Math.max(n.act, n.grad, Math.max(0, inputBoost));
        const r = baseR + glow * 1.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (1 - scale) * 0.8)) * 0.4;

        // Glow
        if (glow > 0.05) {
          const glowColor = n.grad > n.act ? C.grad : C.node;
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r * 2.8, glowColor, glow * 0.08 * depthFactor);
        }

        // Node body — color depends on whether it's showing forward activation or backward gradient
        const bodyColor = n.grad > n.act && n.grad > 0.05 ? C.grad : C.node;
        const bodyAlpha = (0.3 + glow * 0.22) * depthFactor;
        
        // For patches, brightness modulated by patchVal
        if (isPatch) {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r, C.patch, (0.2 + n.patchVal * 0.25 + glow * 0.15) * depthFactor);
        } else {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r, bodyColor, bodyAlpha);
        }

        // For prediction node, extra glow
        if (isPrediction && glow > 0.05) {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r * 3.5, C.pulse, glow * 0.06 * depthFactor);
        }
      }

      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    };

    resize();
    resetRun();
    window.addEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
    animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      aria-hidden="true"
      className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-0 block"
    />
  );
}
```

```typescript
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";

interface NetNode {
  stage: number;
  idx: number;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  z: number;
  act: number;
  twinkle: number;
}

interface NetEdge {
  a: NetNode;
  b: NetNode;
  w: number;
  tw: number;
  kind: "attn" | "ffn" | "skip";
  ctrlX: number;
  ctrlY: number;
  ctrlZ: number;
}

// VLM-style network — vision-language model with cross-attention:
//   stage 0: image patches (2x3 grid)    (6)  — vision input, grid layout
//   stage 1: vision encoder tokens        (6)  — ring, visual features
//   stage 2: language tokens              (6)  — ring, text input
//   stage 3: cross-modal fusion + FFN     (12) — two stacked rings of 6
//   stage 4: output logits                (6)  — ring, generated tokens
// Stages advance along the X axis. Camera is fixed at a diagonal angle
// to convey 3D depth without rotation.
const STAGE_SIZES = [6, 6, 6, 12, 6];
const NUM_STAGES = STAGE_SIZES.length;
const N_TOK = 6;
const PATCH_ROWS = 2;
const PATCH_COLS = 3;

// Cross-attention patterns applied to vision→fusion and lang→fusion edges.
const PATTERNS: Array<(i: number, j: number) => number> = [
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-Math.abs(i - j) / 1.6),
  (i, j) => (i === j ? 0.95 : 0.28 + 0.12 * ((i + j) % 3)),
  (i, j) => (j >= i ? Math.exp(-(j - i) / 2.2) : 0.14),
  (i, j) => (j <= i ? Math.exp(-(i - j) / 2.2) : 0.14),
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-((i - j - 2) ** 2) / 2.4),
  (i, j) => 0.4 + 0.5 * Math.abs(Math.sin((i + 1) * (j + 1) * 0.7)),
];

const C = {
  edge: "hsl(205, 22%, 52%)",
  skip: "hsl(205, 16%, 44%)",
  pulse: "hsl(200, 30%, 64%)",
  node: "hsl(205, 24%, 58%)",
  pos: "hsl(205, 20%, 50%)",
};
const DASH = [3, 4];
const TAU = Math.PI * 2;

// Fixed diagonal camera — no rotation, static 3D perspective.
const CAM_ROT_Y = 0.55;
const CAM_TILT = -0.42;
const FOCAL = 950;
const CAM_Z = 820;

// Phase durations (seconds) for one forward pass cycle.
const ENCODE_DUR = 2.2;
const CROSS_DUR = 3.0;
const OUT_DUR = 1.5;
const SETTLE_DUR = 1.3;
const CYCLE_DUR = ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR + OUT_DUR + SETTLE_DUR;

export default function ParticleField() {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d", { alpha: true });
    if (!ctx) return;

    let animationId = 0;
    let width = 0;
    let height = 0;
    let dpr = 1;
    let resizeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;

    let nodes: NetNode[][] = [];
    let edges: NetEdge[] = [];
    let posPoints: Array<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }> = [];
    let runStart = performance.now();
    let nextReset = 30 + Math.random() * 14;
    let cycle = 0;
    let patIdx = Math.floor(Math.random() * PATTERNS.length);

    const randn = () =>
      (Math.random() + Math.random() + Math.random() - 1.5) * 0.5;

    let stageSpacingX = 130;
    let ringRadius = 80;
    let ffnRingRadius = 110;
    let ffnRingOffsetY = 22;
    let patchSpacing = 56;
    let layoutCy = 0;

    const project = (wx: number, wy: number, wz: number) => {
      // Fixed rotation — no animation, just a static diagonal view.
      const cosY = Math.cos(CAM_ROT_Y);
      const sinY = Math.sin(CAM_ROT_Y);
      const rx = wx * cosY - wz * sinY;
      const rz = wx * sinY + wz * cosY;
      const cosT = Math.cos(CAM_TILT);
      const sinT = Math.sin(CAM_TILT);
      const ty = wy * cosT - rz * sinT;
      const tz = wy * sinT + rz * cosT;
      const denom = CAM_Z + tz;
      const safeDenom = denom > 1 ? denom : 1;
      const scale = FOCAL / safeDenom;
      return {
        sx: width / 2 + rx * scale,
        sy: layoutCy + ty * scale,
        depth: tz,
        scale,
      };
    };

    const buildNetwork = () => {
      nodes = [];
      edges = [];
      posPoints = [];

      const availW = width - 300;
      stageSpacingX = Math.max(95, Math.min(140, availW / (NUM_STAGES - 1)));
      const h = height;
      ringRadius = Math.min(72, h * 0.16);
      ffnRingRadius = Math.min(100, h * 0.22);
      ffnRingOffsetY = ringRadius * 0.55;
      patchSpacing = ringRadius * 0.72;
      layoutCy = height * 0.5;

      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const n = STAGE_SIZES[s];
        const stageNodes: NetNode[] = [];
        const wx = (s - (NUM_STAGES - 1) / 2) * stageSpacingX;

        if (s === 0) {
          // Image patches: 2x3 grid in the Y-Z plane
          for (let r = 0; r < PATCH_ROWS; r++) {
            for (let c = 0; c < PATCH_COLS; c++) {
              stageNodes.push({
                stage: s,
                idx: r * PATCH_COLS + c,
                x: wx,
                y: (r - (PATCH_ROWS - 1) / 2) * patchSpacing,
                z: (c - (PATCH_COLS - 1) / 2) * patchSpacing,
                act: 0,
                twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              });
            }
          }
        } else if (s === 3) {
          // Fusion + FFN: two stacked rings of 6
          for (let ring = 0; ring < 2; ring++) {
            const yOff = ring === 0 ? -ffnRingOffsetY : ffnRingOffsetY;
            for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
              const ang = (i / 6) * TAU;
              stageNodes.push({
                stage: s,
                idx: ring * 6 + i,
                x: wx,
                y: yOff + Math.cos(ang) * ffnRingRadius,
                z: Math.sin(ang) * ffnRingRadius,
                act: 0,
                twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          // Single ring of n nodes
          for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            const ang = (i / n) * TAU;
            stageNodes.push({
              stage: s,
              idx: i,
              x: wx,
              y: Math.cos(ang) * ringRadius,
              z: Math.sin(ang) * ringRadius,
              act: 0,
              twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
            });
          }
        }
        nodes.push(stageNodes);
      }

      const pat = PATTERNS[patIdx];
      const addEdge = (a: NetNode, b: NetNode, w: number, kind: NetEdge["kind"]) => {
        const cx = (a.x + b.x) / 2;
        const cy = (a.y + b.y) / 2;
        let cz = (a.z + b.z) / 2;
        if (kind === "skip") {
          const r = Math.sqrt(cy * cy + cz * cz);
          const k = r > 1 ? 1.35 : 1;
          cz *= k;
        } else {
          const dx = b.x - a.x;
          cz += dx * 0.04;
        }
        edges.push({ a, b, w, tw: w, kind, ctrlX: cx, ctrlY: cy, ctrlZ: cz });
      };

      // Vision encoding: patches → vision encoder
      for (const a of nodes[0]) for (const b of nodes[1]) addEdge(a, b, pat(a.idx, b.idx), "attn");
      // Cross-attention: vision encoder → fusion (first ring)
      for (const a of nodes[1]) for (let bi = 0; bi < 6; bi++) addEdge(a, nodes[3][bi], pat(a.idx, bi), "attn");
      // Cross-attention: language tokens → fusion (second ring)
      for (const a of nodes[2]) for (let bi = 6; bi < 12; bi++) addEdge(a, nodes[3][bi], pat(a.idx, bi - 6), "attn");
      // FFN output: fusion → output
      for (const a of nodes[3]) for (const b of nodes[4]) addEdge(a, b, randn() * 0.4, "ffn");
      // Residual connections
      for (let i = 0; i < N_TOK; i++) {
        addEdge(nodes[1][i], nodes[4][i], randn() * 0.28, "skip"); // vision residual
        addEdge(nodes[2][i], nodes[4][i], randn() * 0.28, "skip"); // lang residual
      }

      // Positional encoding: helix around vision patches (stage 0)
      const tokX = nodes[0][0].x;
      const helixR = patchSpacing * 2.0;
      for (let i = 0; i < N_TOK * 2; i++) {
        const t = i / (N_TOK * 2 - 1);
        const ang = t * TAU * 1.2;
        posPoints.push({
          x: tokX - 8 + Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 4,
          y: Math.cos(ang) * helixR,
          z: Math.sin(ang) * helixR,
        });
      }
    };

    const resetRun = () => {
      patIdx = (patIdx + 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * (PATTERNS.length - 1))) % PATTERNS.length;
      const pat = PATTERNS[patIdx];
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind === "attn") e.tw = pat(e.a.idx, e.b.idx % N_TOK);
        else e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * (e.kind === "skip" ? 0.04 : 0.05);
      }
      runStart = performance.now();
      nextReset = 30 + Math.random() * 14;
      cycle = 0;
    };

    const resize = () => {
      dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
      width = window.innerWidth;
      height = Math.min(380, Math.max(260, Math.floor(window.innerHeight * 0.38)));
      canvas.width = Math.floor(width * dpr);
      canvas.height = Math.floor(height * dpr);
      canvas.style.width = `${width}px`;
      canvas.style.height = `${height}px`;
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#000000";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
      buildNetwork();
    };

    const debouncedResize = () => {
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(resize, 180);
    };

    const fillCircle = (sx: number, sy: number, r: number, color: string, alpha: number) => {
      if (r < 0.2) return;
      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, r, 0, TAU);
      ctx.fill();
    };

    const draw = (now: number) => {
      const rt = (now - runStart) * 0.001;
      if (rt > nextReset) resetRun();

      const cycleTime = rt % CYCLE_DUR;
      let phase: "encode" | "cross" | "out" | "settle" = "encode";
      let phaseT = 0;
      if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR) {
        phase = "encode";
        phaseT = cycleTime / ENCODE_DUR;
      } else if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR) {
        phase = "cross";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR) / CROSS_DUR;
      } else if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR + OUT_DUR) {
        phase = "out";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR - CROSS_DUR) / OUT_DUR;
      } else {
        phase = "settle";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR - CROSS_DUR - OUT_DUR) / SETTLE_DUR;
      }

      const curCycle = Math.floor(rt / CYCLE_DUR);
      if (curCycle !== cycle) {
        cycle = curCycle;
        for (const e of edges) {
          if (e.kind !== "attn") e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.03;
        }
        for (const n of nodes[0]) n.twinkle = Math.random() * TAU;
      }

      const updateRate = phase === "settle" ? 0.06 : 0.012;
      for (const e of edges) e.w += (e.tw - e.w) * updateRate;

      // Sweep position along stages.
      let sweepPos = 0;
      if (phase === "encode") sweepPos = phaseT * 2;        // 0 → 2
      else if (phase === "cross") sweepPos = 2 + phaseT;     // 2 → 3
      else if (phase === "out") sweepPos = 3 + phaseT;       // 3 → 4
      else sweepPos = 4;

      const queryF = phase === "cross" ? phaseT * N_TOK : -1;

      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const dist = Math.abs(sweepPos - s);
        const bump = Math.exp(-(dist * dist) / 0.5);
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          if (phase === "settle") n.act *= 0.8;
          else n.act = Math.max(n.act * 0.84, bump);
        }
      }

      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42)";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const isSweeping = phase !== "settle";

      // Project all nodes.
      const projNodes: Array<{ n: NetNode; sx: number; sy: number; depth: number; scale: number }> = [];
      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          const p = project(n.x, n.y, n.z);
          projNodes.push({ n, sx: p.sx, sy: p.sy, depth: p.depth, scale: p.scale });
        }
      }

      // Positional encoding helix
      if (posPoints.length > 0) {
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1;
        ctx.strokeStyle = C.pos;
        ctx.lineWidth = 0.7;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i < posPoints.length; i++) {
          const p = project(posPoints[i].x, posPoints[i].y, posPoints[i].z);
          if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.sx, p.sy);
          else ctx.lineTo(p.sx, p.sy);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
        for (const pp of posPoints) {
          const p = project(pp.x, pp.y, pp.z);
          fillCircle(p.sx, p.sy, 1.0 * p.scale, C.pos, 0.14);
        }
      }

      type DrawItem = { depth: number; fn: () => void };
      const drawItems: DrawItem[] = [];

      // Attention + FFN edges
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind === "skip") continue;
        const a = e.a;
        const b = e.b;
        const lo = a.stage;
        const hi = b.stage;
        const mag = Math.abs(e.w);
        const sweeping = isSweeping && sweepPos >= lo - 0.1 && sweepPos <= hi + 0.1;

        let alpha = 0.02 + mag * 0.07;
        if (sweeping) {
          const span = hi - lo;
          const edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
          const prox = Math.sin(
            Math.min(1, Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(edgeProgress - 0.5) * 2)) * Math.PI * 0.5,
          );
          alpha += prox * 0.12;
        }
        if (e.kind === "attn" && queryF >= 0) {
          const bMod = b.idx % N_TOK;
          const qprox = Math.exp(-((queryF - bMod - 0.5) ** 2) / 0.7);
          alpha += qprox * 0.1;
        }

        const pa = project(a.x, a.y, a.z);
        const pb = project(b.x, b.y, b.z);
        const avgDepth = (pa.depth + pb.depth) * 0.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, avgDepth / 700)) * 0.55;
        const finalAlpha = Math.min(1, alpha * depthFactor);
        const avgScale = (pa.scale + pb.scale) * 0.5;
        const lw = (0.35 + mag * 0.7) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, avgScale));

        drawItems.push({
          depth: avgDepth,
          fn: () => {
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.globalAlpha = finalAlpha;
            ctx.strokeStyle = C.edge;
            ctx.lineWidth = lw;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pa.sx, pa.sy);
            ctx.lineTo(pb.sx, pb.sy);
            ctx.stroke();

            if (sweeping && mag > 0.25) {
              const span = hi - lo;
              const edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
              const p = edgeProgress;
              const px = pa.sx + (pb.sx - pa.sx) * p;
              const py = pa.sy + (pb.sy - pa.sy) * p;
              fillCircle(px, py, 1.1 * avgScale, C.pulse, 0.35);
            }
          },
        });
      }

      // Residual edges (dashed bezier)
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind !== "skip") continue;
        const a = e.a;
        const b = e.b;
        const lo = a.stage;
        const hi = b.stage;
        const mag = Math.abs(e.w);
        const sweeping = isSweeping && sweepPos >= lo - 0.1 && sweepPos <= hi + 0.1;

        let alpha = 0.03 + mag * 0.06;
        if (sweeping) alpha += 0.07;

        const pa = project(a.x, a.y, a.z);
        const pb = project(b.x, b.y, b.z);
        const pc = project(e.ctrlX, e.ctrlY, e.ctrlZ);
        const avgDepth = (pa.depth + pb.depth) * 0.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, avgDepth / 700)) * 0.55;
        const finalAlpha = Math.min(1, alpha * depthFactor);
        const avgScale = (pa.scale + pb.scale) * 0.5;
        const lw = (0.35 + mag * 0.5) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, avgScale));

        drawItems.push({
          depth: avgDepth,
          fn: () => {
            ctx.setLineDash(DASH);
            ctx.globalAlpha = finalAlpha;
            ctx.strokeStyle = C.skip;
            ctx.lineWidth = lw;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pa.sx, pa.sy);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(pc.sx, pc.sy, pb.sx, pb.sy);
            ctx.stroke();
          },
        });
      }

      drawItems.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const it of drawItems) it.fn();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);

      // Nodes — back-to-front
      projNodes.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const { n, sx, sy, scale } of projNodes) {
        const isPatch = n.stage === 0;
        const isEdge = n.stage === 0 || n.stage === NUM_STAGES - 1;
        const baseR = (isEdge ? 2.8 : 2.2) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, scale));
        const inputBoost = n.stage === 0 ? 0.18 + 0.12 * Math.sin(rt * 0.8 + n.twinkle) : 0;
        const glow = Math.max(n.act, Math.max(0, inputBoost));
        const r = baseR + glow * 1.2;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (1 - scale) * 0.8)) * 0.4;

        if (glow > 0.05) {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r * 2.4, C.node, glow * 0.07 * depthFactor);
        }

        if (isPatch) {
          // Draw patches as small squares to suggest image regions
          ctx.globalAlpha = (0.32 + glow * 0.2) * depthFactor;
          ctx.fillStyle = C.node;
          const halfR = r * 0.85;
          ctx.fillRect(sx - halfR, sy - halfR, halfR * 2, halfR * 2);
        } else {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r, C.node, (0.32 + glow * 0.2) * depthFactor);
        }
      }

      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    };

    resize();
    resetRun();
    window.addEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
    animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      aria-hidden="true"
      className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-0 block"
    />
  );
}

Here's the full plan:

```typescript
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";

interface NetNode {
  stage: number;
  idx: number;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  z: number;
  act: number;
  twinkle: number;
}

interface NetEdge {
  a: NetNode;
  b: NetNode;
  w: number;
  tw: number;
  kind: "attn" | "ffn" | "skip";
  ctrlX: number;
  ctrlY: number;
  ctrlZ: number;
}

// VLM-style network — vision-language model with cross-attention:
//   stage 0: image patches (2x3 grid)    (6)  — vision input, grid layout
//   stage 1: vision encoder tokens        (6)  — ring, visual features
//   stage 2: language tokens              (6)  — ring, text input
//   stage 3: cross-modal fusion + FFN     (12) — two stacked rings of 6
//   stage 4: output logits                (6)  — ring, generated tokens
// Stages advance along the X axis. Camera is fixed at a diagonal angle
// to convey 3D depth without rotation.
const STAGE_SIZES = [6, 6, 6, 12, 6];
const NUM_STAGES = STAGE_SIZES.length;
const N_TOK = 6;
const PATCH_ROWS = 2;
const PATCH_COLS = 3;

// Cross-attention patterns applied to vision→fusion and lang→fusion edges.
const PATTERNS: Array<(i: number, j: number) => number> = [
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-Math.abs(i - j) / 1.6),
  (i, j) => (i === j ? 0.95 : 0.28 + 0.12 * ((i + j) % 3)),
  (i, j) => (j >= i ? Math.exp(-(j - i) / 2.2) : 0.14),
  (i, j) => (j <= i ? Math.exp(-(i - j) / 2.2) : 0.14),
  (i, j) => Math.exp(-((i - j - 2) ** 2) / 2.4),
  (i, j) => 0.4 + 0.5 * Math.abs(Math.sin((i + 1) * (j + 1) * 0.7)),
];

const C = {
  edge: "hsl(205, 22%, 52%)",
  skip: "hsl(205, 16%, 44%)",
  pulse: "hsl(200, 30%, 64%)",
  node: "hsl(205, 24%, 58%)",
  pos: "hsl(205, 20%, 50%)",
};
const DASH = [3, 4];
const TAU = Math.PI * 2;

// Fixed diagonal camera — no rotation, static 3D perspective.
const CAM_ROT_Y = 0.55;
const CAM_TILT = -0.42;
const FOCAL = 950;
const CAM_Z = 820;

// Phase durations (seconds) for one forward pass cycle.
const ENCODE_DUR = 2.2;
const CROSS_DUR = 3.0;
const OUT_DUR = 1.5;
const SETTLE_DUR = 1.3;
const CYCLE_DUR = ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR + OUT_DUR + SETTLE_DUR;

export default function ParticleField() {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d", { alpha: true });
    if (!ctx) return;

    let animationId = 0;
    let width = 0;
    let height = 0;
    let dpr = 1;
    let resizeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;

    let nodes: NetNode[][] = [];
    let edges: NetEdge[] = [];
    let posPoints: Array<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }> = [];
    let runStart = performance.now();
    let nextReset = 30 + Math.random() * 14;
    let cycle = 0;
    let patIdx = Math.floor(Math.random() * PATTERNS.length);

    const randn = () =>
      (Math.random() + Math.random() + Math.random() - 1.5) * 0.5;

    let stageSpacingX = 130;
    let ringRadius = 80;
    let ffnRingRadius = 110;
    let ffnRingOffsetY = 22;
    let patchSpacing = 56;
    let layoutCy = 0;

    const project = (wx: number, wy: number, wz: number) => {
      // Fixed rotation — no animation, just a static diagonal view.
      const cosY = Math.cos(CAM_ROT_Y);
      const sinY = Math.sin(CAM_ROT_Y);
      const rx = wx * cosY - wz * sinY;
      const rz = wx * sinY + wz * cosY;
      const cosT = Math.cos(CAM_TILT);
      const sinT = Math.sin(CAM_TILT);
      const ty = wy * cosT - rz * sinT;
      const tz = wy * sinT + rz * cosT;
      const denom = CAM_Z + tz;
      const safeDenom = denom > 1 ? denom : 1;
      const scale = FOCAL / safeDenom;
      return {
        sx: width / 2 + rx * scale,
        sy: layoutCy + ty * scale,
        depth: tz,
        scale,
      };
    };

    const buildNetwork = () => {
      nodes = [];
      edges = [];
      posPoints = [];

      const availW = width - 300;
      stageSpacingX = Math.max(95, Math.min(140, availW / (NUM_STAGES - 1)));
      const h = height;
      ringRadius = Math.min(72, h * 0.16);
      ffnRingRadius = Math.min(100, h * 0.22);
      ffnRingOffsetY = ringRadius * 0.55;
      patchSpacing = ringRadius * 0.72;
      layoutCy = height * 0.5;

      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const n = STAGE_SIZES[s];
        const stageNodes: NetNode[] = [];
        const wx = (s - (NUM_STAGES - 1) / 2) * stageSpacingX;

        if (s === 0) {
          // Image patches: 2x3 grid in the Y-Z plane
          for (let r = 0; r < PATCH_ROWS; r++) {
            for (let c = 0; c < PATCH_COLS; c++) {
              stageNodes.push({
                stage: s,
                idx: r * PATCH_COLS + c,
                x: wx,
                y: (r - (PATCH_ROWS - 1) / 2) * patchSpacing,
                z: (c - (PATCH_COLS - 1) / 2) * patchSpacing,
                act: 0,
                twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              });
            }
          }
        } else if (s === 3) {
          // Fusion + FFN: two stacked rings of 6
          for (let ring = 0; ring < 2; ring++) {
            const yOff = ring === 0 ? -ffnRingOffsetY : ffnRingOffsetY;
            for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
              const ang = (i / 6) * TAU;
              stageNodes.push({
                stage: s,
                idx: ring * 6 + i,
                x: wx,
                y: yOff + Math.cos(ang) * ffnRingRadius,
                z: Math.sin(ang) * ffnRingRadius,
                act: 0,
                twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          // Single ring of n nodes
          for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            const ang = (i / n) * TAU;
            stageNodes.push({
              stage: s,
              idx: i,
              x: wx,
              y: Math.cos(ang) * ringRadius,
              z: Math.sin(ang) * ringRadius,
              act: 0,
              twinkle: Math.random() * TAU,
            });
          }
        }
        nodes.push(stageNodes);
      }

      const pat = PATTERNS[patIdx];
      const addEdge = (a: NetNode, b: NetNode, w: number, kind: NetEdge["kind"]) => {
        const cx = (a.x + b.x) / 2;
        const cy = (a.y + b.y) / 2;
        let cz = (a.z + b.z) / 2;
        if (kind === "skip") {
          const r = Math.sqrt(cy * cy + cz * cz);
          const k = r > 1 ? 1.35 : 1;
          cz *= k;
        } else {
          const dx = b.x - a.x;
          cz += dx * 0.04;
        }
        edges.push({ a, b, w, tw: w, kind, ctrlX: cx, ctrlY: cy, ctrlZ: cz });
      };

      // Vision encoding: patches → vision encoder
      for (const a of nodes[0]) for (const b of nodes[1]) addEdge(a, b, pat(a.idx, b.idx), "attn");
      // Cross-attention: vision encoder → fusion (first ring)
      for (const a of nodes[1]) for (let bi = 0; bi < 6; bi++) addEdge(a, nodes[3][bi], pat(a.idx, bi), "attn");
      // Cross-attention: language tokens → fusion (second ring)
      for (const a of nodes[2]) for (let bi = 6; bi < 12; bi++) addEdge(a, nodes[3][bi], pat(a.idx, bi - 6), "attn");
      // FFN output: fusion → output
      for (const a of nodes[3]) for (const b of nodes[4]) addEdge(a, b, randn() * 0.4, "ffn");
      // Residual connections
      for (let i = 0; i < N_TOK; i++) {
        addEdge(nodes[1][i], nodes[4][i], randn() * 0.28, "skip"); // vision residual
        addEdge(nodes[2][i], nodes[4][i], randn() * 0.28, "skip"); // lang residual
      }

      // Positional encoding: helix around vision patches (stage 0)
      const tokX = nodes[0][0].x;
      const helixR = patchSpacing * 2.0;
      for (let i = 0; i < N_TOK * 2; i++) {
        const t = i / (N_TOK * 2 - 1);
        const ang = t * TAU * 1.2;
        posPoints.push({
          x: tokX - 8 + Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 4,
          y: Math.cos(ang) * helixR,
          z: Math.sin(ang) * helixR,
        });
      }
    };

    const resetRun = () => {
      patIdx = (patIdx + 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * (PATTERNS.length - 1))) % PATTERNS.length;
      const pat = PATTERNS[patIdx];
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind === "attn") e.tw = pat(e.a.idx, e.b.idx % N_TOK);
        else e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * (e.kind === "skip" ? 0.04 : 0.05);
      }
      runStart = performance.now();
      nextReset = 30 + Math.random() * 14;
      cycle = 0;
    };

    const resize = () => {
      dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
      width = window.innerWidth;
      height = Math.min(380, Math.max(260, Math.floor(window.innerHeight * 0.38)));
      canvas.width = Math.floor(width * dpr);
      canvas.height = Math.floor(height * dpr);
      canvas.style.width = `${width}px`;
      canvas.style.height = `${height}px`;
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#000000";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
      buildNetwork();
    };

    const debouncedResize = () => {
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(resize, 180);
    };

    const fillCircle = (sx: number, sy: number, r: number, color: string, alpha: number) => {
      if (r < 0.2) return;
      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, r, 0, TAU);
      ctx.fill();
    };

    const draw = (now: number) => {
      const rt = (now - runStart) * 0.001;
      if (rt > nextReset) resetRun();

      const cycleTime = rt % CYCLE_DUR;
      let phase: "encode" | "cross" | "out" | "settle" = "encode";
      let phaseT = 0;
      if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR) {
        phase = "encode";
        phaseT = cycleTime / ENCODE_DUR;
      } else if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR) {
        phase = "cross";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR) / CROSS_DUR;
      } else if (cycleTime < ENCODE_DUR + CROSS_DUR + OUT_DUR) {
        phase = "out";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR - CROSS_DUR) / OUT_DUR;
      } else {
        phase = "settle";
        phaseT = (cycleTime - ENCODE_DUR - CROSS_DUR - OUT_DUR) / SETTLE_DUR;
      }

      const curCycle = Math.floor(rt / CYCLE_DUR);
      if (curCycle !== cycle) {
        cycle = curCycle;
        for (const e of edges) {
          if (e.kind !== "attn") e.tw += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.03;
        }
        for (const n of nodes[0]) n.twinkle = Math.random() * TAU;
      }

      const updateRate = phase === "settle" ? 0.06 : 0.012;
      for (const e of edges) e.w += (e.tw - e.w) * updateRate;

      // Sweep position along stages.
      let sweepPos = 0;
      if (phase === "encode") sweepPos = phaseT * 2;        // 0 → 2
      else if (phase === "cross") sweepPos = 2 + phaseT;     // 2 → 3
      else if (phase === "out") sweepPos = 3 + phaseT;       // 3 → 4
      else sweepPos = 4;

      const queryF = phase === "cross" ? phaseT * N_TOK : -1;

      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        const dist = Math.abs(sweepPos - s);
        const bump = Math.exp(-(dist * dist) / 0.5);
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          if (phase === "settle") n.act *= 0.8;
          else n.act = Math.max(n.act * 0.84, bump);
        }
      }

      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42)";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const isSweeping = phase !== "settle";

      // Project all nodes.
      const projNodes: Array<{ n: NetNode; sx: number; sy: number; depth: number; scale: number }> = [];
      for (let s = 0; s < NUM_STAGES; s++) {
        for (const n of nodes[s]) {
          const p = project(n.x, n.y, n.z);
          projNodes.push({ n, sx: p.sx, sy: p.sy, depth: p.depth, scale: p.scale });
        }
      }

      // Positional encoding helix
      if (posPoints.length > 0) {
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1;
        ctx.strokeStyle = C.pos;
        ctx.lineWidth = 0.7;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i < posPoints.length; i++) {
          const p = project(posPoints[i].x, posPoints[i].y, posPoints[i].z);
          if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.sx, p.sy);
          else ctx.lineTo(p.sx, p.sy);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
        for (const pp of posPoints) {
          const p = project(pp.x, pp.y, pp.z);
          fillCircle(p.sx, p.sy, 1.0 * p.scale, C.pos, 0.14);
        }
      }

      type DrawItem = { depth: number; fn: () => void };
      const drawItems: DrawItem[] = [];

      // Attention + FFN edges
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind === "skip") continue;
        const a = e.a;
        const b = e.b;
        const lo = a.stage;
        const hi = b.stage;
        const mag = Math.abs(e.w);
        const sweeping = isSweeping && sweepPos >= lo - 0.1 && sweepPos <= hi + 0.1;

        let alpha = 0.02 + mag * 0.07;
        if (sweeping) {
          const span = hi - lo;
          const edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
          const prox = Math.sin(
            Math.min(1, Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(edgeProgress - 0.5) * 2)) * Math.PI * 0.5,
          );
          alpha += prox * 0.12;
        }
        if (e.kind === "attn" && queryF >= 0) {
          const bMod = b.idx % N_TOK;
          const qprox = Math.exp(-((queryF - bMod - 0.5) ** 2) / 0.7);
          alpha += qprox * 0.1;
        }

        const pa = project(a.x, a.y, a.z);
        const pb = project(b.x, b.y, b.z);
        const avgDepth = (pa.depth + pb.depth) * 0.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, avgDepth / 700)) * 0.55;
        const finalAlpha = Math.min(1, alpha * depthFactor);
        const avgScale = (pa.scale + pb.scale) * 0.5;
        const lw = (0.35 + mag * 0.7) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, avgScale));

        drawItems.push({
          depth: avgDepth,
          fn: () => {
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.globalAlpha = finalAlpha;
            ctx.strokeStyle = C.edge;
            ctx.lineWidth = lw;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pa.sx, pa.sy);
            ctx.lineTo(pb.sx, pb.sy);
            ctx.stroke();

            if (sweeping && mag > 0.25) {
              const span = hi - lo;
              const edgeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (sweepPos - lo) / span));
              const p = edgeProgress;
              const px = pa.sx + (pb.sx - pa.sx) * p;
              const py = pa.sy + (pb.sy - pa.sy) * p;
              fillCircle(px, py, 1.1 * avgScale, C.pulse, 0.35);
            }
          },
        });
      }

      // Residual edges (dashed bezier)
      for (const e of edges) {
        if (e.kind !== "skip") continue;
        const a = e.a;
        const b = e.b;
        const lo = a.stage;
        const hi = b.stage;
        const mag = Math.abs(e.w);
        const sweeping = isSweeping && sweepPos >= lo - 0.1 && sweepPos <= hi + 0.1;

        let alpha = 0.03 + mag * 0.06;
        if (sweeping) alpha += 0.07;

        const pa = project(a.x, a.y, a.z);
        const pb = project(b.x, b.y, b.z);
        const pc = project(e.ctrlX, e.ctrlY, e.ctrlZ);
        const avgDepth = (pa.depth + pb.depth) * 0.5;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, avgDepth / 700)) * 0.55;
        const finalAlpha = Math.min(1, alpha * depthFactor);
        const avgScale = (pa.scale + pb.scale) * 0.5;
        const lw = (0.35 + mag * 0.5) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, avgScale));

        drawItems.push({
          depth: avgDepth,
          fn: () => {
            ctx.setLineDash(DASH);
            ctx.globalAlpha = finalAlpha;
            ctx.strokeStyle = C.skip;
            ctx.lineWidth = lw;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(pa.sx, pa.sy);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(pc.sx, pc.sy, pb.sx, pb.sy);
            ctx.stroke();
          },
        });
      }

      drawItems.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const it of drawItems) it.fn();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);

      // Nodes — back-to-front
      projNodes.sort((x, y) => y.depth - x.depth);
      for (const { n, sx, sy, scale } of projNodes) {
        const isPatch = n.stage === 0;
        const isEdge = n.stage === 0 || n.stage === NUM_STAGES - 1;
        const baseR = (isEdge ? 2.8 : 2.2) * Math.min(1.3, Math.max(0.5, scale));
        const inputBoost = n.stage === 0 ? 0.18 + 0.12 * Math.sin(rt * 0.8 + n.twinkle) : 0;
        const glow = Math.max(n.act, Math.max(0, inputBoost));
        const r = baseR + glow * 1.2;
        const depthFactor = 1 - Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (1 - scale) * 0.8)) * 0.4;

        if (glow > 0.05) {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r * 2.4, C.node, glow * 0.07 * depthFactor);
        }

        if (isPatch) {
          // Draw patches as small squares to suggest image regions
          ctx.globalAlpha = (0.32 + glow * 0.2) * depthFactor;
          ctx.fillStyle = C.node;
          const halfR = r * 0.85;
          ctx.fillRect(sx - halfR, sy - halfR, halfR * 2, halfR * 2);
        } else {
          fillCircle(sx, sy, r, C.node, (0.32 + glow * 0.2) * depthFactor);
        }
      }

      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    };

    resize();
    resetRun();
    window.addEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
    animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", debouncedResize);
      if (resizeTimer) clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      aria-hidden="true"
      className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-0 block"
    />
  );
}
```
